title: Attach project to several portfolio boards
excerpt:
Description
Attach project to several portfolio boards 
I need the option to attach the same project to 2 different portfolio boards 
What are you trying to achieve
Attach project to several portfolio boards

posts.author: Mosheks (Moshe Kassabi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Attach project to several portfolio boards
I need the option to attach the same project to 2 different portfolio boards

What are you trying to achieve

Attach project to several portfolio boards

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great addition. Since this isn’t natively supported today, we use a marketplace app called Same Item Multiple Boards, which allows the same item to exist on two different boards and stay in sync. This then enables us to connect them to different portfolio boards.
